75432.subject: Open USD and the distribution war
75432.body:
View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/eaa70932-7ce4-467e-b338-a662ed575d6a/0xR_NL_Banner_Heading_Wordmark.jpg?t=1776775276)
Caption: 

==Happy Friday!==

==Today we look at how Open USD is quietly rewriting stablecoin economics. The new consortium returns almost all reserve income to distributors, sending Circle down 18% and reframing the whole business around who owns distribution. Elsewhere, risk is back on: memes led the week at +17.6%, Solana Eco gained 9%, and tokenized equity volume hit record highs onchain.==

———————————————————————————

View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/42e942ec-f31d-4957-8722-a3ac7b121e1e/0xR_NL_Market_Update.png?t=1767631151) [Market Update]
Caption: 

Memes led this week at +17.6%, atop a broad green board where crypto equities (+13.1%), DEXs (+9.4%), and the Solana ecosystem (+9.0%) all beat bitcoin and the S&P 500, up 2.9% and 1.5%. Revenue leaders (+8.7%) and L1s (+7.6%) followed. Hence, risk appetite is back and seems to be concentrated in the speculative long tail.

Solana Eco +9.0% traces to a memecoin resurgence. ANSEM, a [Pump.fun](https://Pump.fun) launch from mid-June, ran to nearly $200M this week while PUMP also gained 27.3%. Ansem appears to be using the tokens to airdrop to the community, trying to simulate the PUMP airdrop that was promised to the market.

View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/e18e3f40-ad88-4968-b0a5-e67805c8f3fe/image.png?t=1783082186)
Caption: 

Among Solana DEXs, Raydium (+16.8%) and Meteora (+16.7%) led the index over Orca (+10.9%). More interesting is what else is starting to route through those pools. Tokenized equity volume on Solana hit all-time highs this quarter, and the chain now settles over 95% of the category.

View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/83b2098e-5645-40c8-abdd-4314e0225c53/image.png?t=1783082186)
Caption: 

Zoom out, and it inverts. The DEX index is down 58.4% on the year; its two leaders this week are the worst annual names: Raydium -67.7%, and Meteora -68.3%, as fees evaporated with the meme craze. But the drawdown may be the setup: proprietary automated market makers (prop AMMs) like HumidiFi and SolFi dominate the most liquid pairs, yet that model isn't economical or worthwhile for the long tail. Pool models keep the franchise on new memecoins, and possibly tokenized equities too, if we see thousands of stocks listed in tokenized form through players like Backpack.

View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/fd8b7aab-12c8-41a7-9052-0bedd062c7c9/image.png?t=1783082186)
Caption: 

_— _[_Sam_](ht

75430.subject: The Ment Tech Intelligence Brief
75430.body:
Ment Tech | Meant To Innovate

Автор: Ment Tech Labs


Автор: Ment Tech Labs

    
    
    Прочитайте цю статтю на LinkedIn, щоб приєднатися до обговорення
Прочитати на LinkedIn
https://www.linkedin.com/comm/pulse/ment-tech-intelligence-brief-menttechlabs-gubgf?lipi=urn%3Ali%3Apage%3Aemail_email_series_follow_newsletter_02%3BpcAGrA0SSlmQLRNt%2Fu03IQ%3D%3D&midToken=AQFTjFOONAfT2w&midSig=3KQUNAOF53tIk1&trk=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-null-0-read_more_banner_cta_&trkEmail=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-null-0-read_more_banner_cta_-null-fz96fz~mr4ysc9n~bp-null-null&eid=fz96fz-mr4ysc9n-bp
  
There are five developments this week. Each one changes the operating environment for every company building on AI and blockchain infrastructure. Here is what every founder, enterprise operator and investor needs to understand. ◆ DEVELOPMENT 01 GitHub Copilot Just Moved To Usage-Based Billing. Developers Are Seeing Their Monthly Costs Jump From $29 To $750. The Token Billing Crisis Has A New Casualty. June 30 was the first full monthly billing cycle close since GitHub Copilot moved to usage-based billing on June 1, 2026. The community reaction has been immediate and loud developers shared screenshots showing projected monthly costs jumping from $29 to $750 and from $50 to $3,000 in heavy agentic workflows. Why it changes the build environment: Copilot's billing shift is the second major coding tool to move from flat-fee to token-based pricing in 30 days. The pattern is now a trend. Every enterprise that standardized internal developer workflows on a flat-fee AI tool is now running a hidden cost that compounds every time a developer opens an agentic session. The bills are arriving before the budget frameworks exist to handle them. The Ment Tech perspective: We flagged this risk pattern last month when Uber burned $3.4 billion in AI spend in four months. The same dynamic is now hitting individual developer tools. Enterprises building on our infrastructure are explicitly scoped against usage-based billing surprises from day one. The clients getting this right are the ones treating AI billing architecture as a build decision, not a finance department problem to solve after the invoice lands. ◆ DEVELOPMENT 02 Alphabet Just Raised $84.75 Billion In The Largest Corporate Equity Financing In History. Every Dollar Is Going Into AI Infrastructure. Alphabet's equity capital raise, announced at $80 billion on June 1 and upsized to $84.75 billion at pricing on June 2, 2026, stands as the largest equity financing in corporate history by a major technology company for AI infrastructure including a $10 billion private placement to Berkshire Hathaway. Why it changes the build environment: When the world's second most valuable company raises the largest equity round in corporate history and designates every dollar for AI compute, it is not a capital markets story. It is a supply signal. Alphabet is purchasing infrastructure capacity years in advance o

75428.subject: Copy of PFI Monthly - June Edition
75428.body:
PFI Monthly 

Автор: Prague Finance Institute


Автор: Prague Finance Institute

    
    
    Прочитайте цю статтю на LinkedIn, щоб приєднатися до обговорення
Прочитати на LinkedIn
https://www.linkedin.com/comm/pulse/copy-pfi-monthly-june-edition-prague-finance-institute-iboif?lipi=urn%3Ali%3Apage%3Aemail_email_series_follow_newsletter_02%3BDY1OsJWjQ62iCfx%2FA6n%2FvA%3D%3D&midToken=AQFTjFOONAfT2w&midSig=2gappmyRARtIk1&trk=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-null-0-read_more_banner_cta_&trkEmail=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-null-0-read_more_banner_cta_-null-fz96fz~mr4y9t9d~y7-null-null&eid=fz96fz-mr4y9t9d-y7
  
Dear professionals, welcome to the new edition of our PFI newsletter. In the June issue, we have prepared for you: PFI Monthly research report including an interview with Taisia Nistorenco, Vice President, Sev.en Global Investments June edition of PFI Monthly Research report We are pleased to share the June edition of the PFI Monthly Research Report. This issue explores key themes shaping global macro, financial markets, corporate finance, private capital, banking, real estate, and behavioral finance. In this issue of PFI Monthly you will find: Global macro – When the Fed changed its voice: Kevin Warsh's first meeting as Fed Chair, the hawkish dot-plot shift, and the retreat from forward guidance as a new form of regime uncertainty; and the balance of payments as a key framework for assessing external vulnerabilities and currency trends Financial markets – Why the AI boom ultimately runs on copper, and the seventeen-year gap between building a data centre and the mine that must feed it; and why mega-IPOs like SpaceX challenge public investors as return potential shifts to the pre-IPO phase Corporate finance – Capital structure of a company: the layered hierarchy of claims and what credit and equity investors each need to understand Czech M&A – Penta Hospitals' acquisition of Südamekodud, the largest long-term care provider in Estonia and the Baltics Private equity – Why corporate carve-outs are attractive again but no longer easy winners; and why Europe should be treated as many private equity markets rather than one allocation Banking sector – Simplifying the capital stack: how the EBA's simplification report delivers "simplification without deregulation" Real estate – Orthogonal risk: the case for value-add and opportunistic over core in private CRE Behavioral finance – Hindsight bias: the "I knew it all along" effect and how to defend against it Book review – The Price of Time: The Real Story of Interest by Edward Chancellor (2022) Read the full edition to explore all insights in detail. 👉 Read the full edition to explore all insights in detail. 🎓 6th Business Valuation Masterclass – applications now open! Ready to strengthen your expertise in business valuation, M&A, and corporate finance? Join the 6th edition of our Business Valuation Masterclass — a practical, case-based program designed for professionals look

75427.subject: Build your business on Claude
75427.body:
The Atlas

Автор: GenAI Works


Автор: GenAI Works

    
    
    Прочитайте цю статтю на LinkedIn, щоб приєднатися до обговорення
Прочитати на LinkedIn
https://www.linkedin.com/comm/pulse/build-your-business-claude-genai-works-9fjde?lipi=urn%3Ali%3Apage%3Aemail_email_series_follow_newsletter_02%3Bhhw5HRJdRsmzUalEzJqgJg%3D%3D&midToken=AQFTjFOONAfT2w&midSig=2HbyilQGANtIk1&trk=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-null-0-read_more_banner_cta_&trkEmail=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-null-0-read_more_banner_cta_-null-fz96fz~mr4xnh9h~hp-null-null&eid=fz96fz-mr4xnh9h-hp
  
Welcome back! This edition is about leverage and its fine print. You will see how much of a business one person can now automate, why the model you depend on can vanish for 18 days, and how the biggest players are racing to make AI cheaper and harder to leave. Four stories, one thread: the tools are getting more powerful, and the strategy behind choosing them matters more than ever.  In today's Atlas Newsletter: 24 commands that run the boring half of your business. Turn weekly busywork into one-word jobs across sales, support and growth. When the government can switch off your AI vendor. Anthropic's models went dark for 18 days by government order. Never build everything on one provider. Anthropic wants to be your lab and your cloud. Claude Science and the Foundry launch make Claude easier to adopt and harder to swap out. Google just priced AI images at three cents a thousand. Nano Banana 2 Lite makes generation nearly free at scale. PS: Want to collaborate with the biggest GTM engine and distribution moat for AI companies? You can feature your tool with us and reach millions. 24 commands that run the boring half of your business  Most people use their AI like a search bar, asking one question at a time.  The people getting ahead do something different.  They save the tasks they repeat every week as commands, so one word does the whole job for them.  A popular reference sheet collects 24 of these, sorted by what they do, and together they show how much of a business one person can now run. Start with the growth tasks.  → There is a Monday brief that pulls your week ahead and open threads into one summary.  → A business pulse that reads your Notion, Gmail and Slack into a single page.  → A meeting tool that turns any transcript into decisions, owners and dates.  These are the jobs that eat a founder's morning before the real work starts. Sales and support are where the time really adds up.  → On sales, one command hands you today's five best leads with an opener for each.  → Another writes the next follow-up for every deal that went cold.  → A third turns a client's win into a case study with visuals.  On support, one command sorts your incoming messages into the three issues worth fixing this week.  Another draft complaint replies in your tone. A third finds happy customers and asks them for a testimonial. This is work that usually needs a hire, done with saved i

------------
How to start
------------

For a limited time, inviting a friend to Kraken pays off even
more.

When a friend joins with your link and gets started, you now
earn up to €250 — and your friend earns a reward too.

Here is how it works:

* Share your referral link with a friend
* Your friend signs up, then deposits and trades €200 in 30 days
* You both get rewarded
Now is the moment to send it. MiCA rules are in force across
the EU, and a friend may still be on an exchange that is not
MiCA-authorised such as Binance, MEXC and many more.

Kraken has been trusted since 2011, with MiCA authorisation via
the Central Bank of Ireland and quarterly Proof of Reserves,
independently verified.

Even more, once your friend joins Kraken, they can also opt into
the €1M draw — on top of the reward you both earn. Every euro
they deposit before 31 Jul earns one entry.

75425.subject: Не вдавай, що не помітив цього листа.
75425.body:
Усередині — трохи любові та знижка 25 %.‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ​Привіт!​Тримай трохи любові від нас.​І приємну знижку на додачу.​Ось вона — справжня любов:​[Hamster] А ось і знижка 25 % на звіт carVertical →​[Хочу знижку 25 %](https://www.carvertical.com/uk/pricing?voucher=hamster25)​От і все. Ось такий лист.
